training_status: Experienced gym-goer, 14 years, mountain biking and boxing for cardio

benefits.description: Improved sleep noted as a benefit

side_effects.description: Initial water retention from GH that subsided after a short period of time; motivated to stop if it had persisted due to desire to maintain visible abs at 50+

protocol_notes: User notes they get puffy from everything including creatine. GH water retention resolved on its own. Has been training for 14+ years. Diet consists of pre-made non-processed meals, daily oatmeal, no added sugar Sun-Thu/Fri, cheat day on Saturday, no fast food or soda in 10 years.
